assignments.name: Assign_Lead_s_Location_from_New_Location
assignments.label: Assign Lead's Location from New Location

assignments.name: Assign_Lead_s_Location_Id_from_Latest_Updated_Location
assignments.label: Assign Lead's Location Id from Latest Updated Location

assignments.name: Assign_Lead_s_Location_Id_from_Org_Location_Match
assignments.label: Assign Lead's Location Id from Org Location Match

assignments.name: Assign_Lead_s_Location_Id_with_Primary_Location
assignments.label: Assign Lead's Location Id with Primary Location

assignments.name: Assign_Lead_to_New_Org_Location
assignments.label: Assign Lead to New Org / Location

value.stringValue: New Org; New Location - No Matches Found
No Org Match; Matched on Existing Location

assignments.name: Assign_Matched_Org_ID_Email_Domain
assignments.label: Assign Matched Org ID - Email Domain

assignments.name: Assign_Matched_Org_ID_Mobile_Phone
assignments.label: Assign Matched Org ID - Mobile Phone

Flow.description: 2024-07-22 Replicated the logic from the Scheduled flow to call in the subflow

formulas.description: returns phone if possible, otherwise returns mobile, otherwise
formulas.name: formulaPhoneOrMobilePhone

Flow.label: Lead - Subflow - Org Location Matching Expanded

value.stringValue: Created By New Lead - Org Location Matching
Created By New Lead - Org Location Matching

recordLookups.name: Get_Matching_Locations
recordLookups.label: Get Matching Locations
recordLookups.filterLogic: (1 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 15 AND (2 OR 3 OR 16 OR 17)) OR (7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 10 AND 11 AND 12 AND 13 AND 14)

recordLookups.name: Get_Matching_Org_Email_Domain
recordLookups.label: Get Matching Org - Email Domain
recordLookups.filterLogic: (1 AND (3 OR 4)) OR (2 AND (5 OR 6)) AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 10 AND 11

recordLookups.name: Get_Matching_Org_Mobile_Phone
recordLookups.label: Get Matching Org - Mobile Phone
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 5 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 11 AND 12 AND 13 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 6 OR 10)

recordLookups.name: Get_Matching_Org_Phone
recordLookups.label: Get Matching Org - Phone
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 5 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 11 AND 12 AND 13 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 6 OR 10)
